affordances.name: Careful thinking
affordances.mechanism: Use this model to think more carefully about the problem and make a better decision.

use_when: The problem is important and needs careful thought.

treatment_requirements.description: Use this model to analyze the situation and consider the risks.

diagnostic_questions: How can we think more carefully about this problem?
misuse_guards: Do not forget to consider the problem carefully.

source_evidence.source_quote: The application of this model centers on developing a disciplined approach to identifying the single most leverageable point and dedicating resources to it.

review_notes.normalization_note: Intentional invalid fixture: this is generic filler.
